full_text:
Mother Xu 徐母
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Mother Xu (徐母). Xu Shu’s mother. Captured by Cao Cao, resulting in Xu Shu leaving Liu Bei. Mother Xu was affiliated with Unaligned. Mother Xu lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
